title: Week 3 Day 1 Facilitator Guide
objective: Guide rookies through completing FEC blocks 4-6, ensuring they understand how to capture and enable value in their advisory practice.
preparation: Review each rookie's Week 2 FEC progress in advance
Prepare 2-3 revenue model examples relevant to the cohort
Test canvas wizard functionality before class
Print FEC reference sheets for each squad
Set up breakout spaces for squad peer review

facilitation: Quick squad check-in on Week 2 customer discoveries
Frame today: 'Your customer work becomes your business model'
Walk through FEC blocks 4-6 using coach deck
Show examples of revenue models (commission, fee-only, hybrid)
Explain how resources and partners enable consistent delivery
Rookies work individually on canvas wizard (30 min)
Squad peer review (30 min) - 1 block per rookie
Group debrief: What was hardest? What surprised you?
Preview Week 4: synthesizing canvas into 3-Year Plan and pitch
Clarify Week 3 assignment (finish canvas if incomplete)

commonChallenges.challenge: Rookies struggle to define realistic revenue models
commonChallenges.response: Provide industry benchmarks, ask about their current practice (if applicable), connect to customer willingness to pay
Have backup: printable canvas template, allow manual entry in portfolio later

commonChallenges.challenge: Rookies feel overwhelmed by completing multiple blocks
commonChallenges.response: Emphasize this is a draft, will iterate after Stage Gate 1 feedback, focus on clarity over perfection

commonChallenges.challenge: Squad peer review becomes too critical or too soft
commonChallenges.response: Model constructive feedback: 'This is clear because...' and 'This could be stronger if...'

assessmentFocus: Is the revenue model realistic for their customer segment?
Have they identified key resources beyond just 'myself'?
Does the UVP differentiate them from competitors?
Are cost structures reasonable for a starting practice?
week3Success: By end of Week 3, each rookie should have a complete 6-block FEC that serves as their business blueprint going into Week 4 pitch prep.
